approach_rationale: This is an integration-verification task — minimal new code, test what exists, fix failures discovered during testing.
files_to_modify: CANDIDATES — only if tests/build reveal actual failures:
src/components/GuidedSession.tsx (187 lines, may need extraction if a size check fails)
Any file where TS/ESLint errors are found

steps.name: Run npm run build
steps.risk: prebuild might fail if assets missing; TS errors from parallel tasks

steps.name: Run security audit
steps.risk: Low — previous tasks cleaned this up

steps.name: Start dev server and run E2E tests
steps.risk: Flaky tests, timing issues, missing audio files (hello.mp3)

steps.name: Manual verification: Onboarding journey
steps.action: Navigate to / in fresh browser context; complete onboarding; verify home screen
steps.expected: Child name visible, no JS errors

steps.name: Manual verification: Explore Cards journey
steps.action: Tap 'Explore Cards'; verify PNG images (not placeholders); tap audio button; tap Next
steps.expected: img src points to /images/vocabulary/*.png; audio plays via Howler

steps.name: Manual verification: Listen & Find journey
steps.action: Tap 'Listen & Find'; verify choice cards; tap play; tap correct card
steps.expected: Audio plays; success animation shows; game advances

steps.name: Manual verification: Parent Dashboard journey
steps.action: Tap parent icon; enter correct PIN; verify dashboard
steps.expected: PIN gate blocks wrong PIN; correct PIN shows dashboard

steps.name: Data persistence check
steps.action: Complete onboarding; hard refresh (Cmd+Shift+R); verify home screen still appears

steps.name: Fix any failures
steps.action: Fix specific issues found in steps 2-11

steps.name: Document results
steps.action: Write integration-report.md with pass/fail for each check

expected_tests.unit: npm test (jest --passWithNoTests) — existing unit tests should pass
e2e: sanity.spec.ts: no-hardcoded-api-keys, component-size, activity-routes, audio-buttons, touch-targets
onboarding.spec.ts: full onboarding flow + persistence reload
session.spec.ts: guided session greeting → mood → explore → celebration
parent-dashboard.spec.ts: direct nav redirect, wrong PIN error, correct PIN grants access

risk_areas.mitigation: Previous task 184 regenerated assets; check public/audio/ and public/images/vocabulary/ have all 100+ words covered
Run tsc --noEmit first; fix type errors incrementally
Check .eslintrc.json for error-vs-warn config; fix errors, allow warnings
Tests already have generous timeouts (8-12s); use page.waitForTimeout sparingly
Audio error is handled gracefully (console.warn); test doesn't check audio playback
Extract GreetingStep/MoodWrapper if line count grows

risk_areas.risk: Parent dashboard: isAuthed returns false on direct nav

persistence_strategy: IndexedDB via idb library (getDB in src/lib/db.ts). All settings (childName, childAge, pinHash, onboardingComplete), progress, and sessions stored in 'littlebridge' DB. Survives hard refresh by design.
error_handling_approach: All async ops have try/catch with user-facing error states. API routes: N/A (no server-side API routes in this app — pure client-side). DB operations: try/catch with error state rendering.

key_findings.audio: Howler.js AudioManager in src/lib/audio.ts — verified NOT using browser speechSynthesis
key_findings.images: VocabularyCard uses Next.js Image with src=word.imagePath (/images/vocabulary/*.png); fallback to /images/placeholder.png on error
key_findings.pin_security: SHA-256 with salt 'littlebridge-2026' via Web Crypto API; stored in IndexedDB; session auth via sessionStorage
key_findings.no_api_keys_in_src: Verified: src/ only uses process.env references, never raw key strings
